children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall establish a program to provide financial and technical assistance to control or eradicate noxious weeds.

children.heading: Grants
children.label: b Grants
children.text: Subject to the availability of appropriations under , the Secretary shall make grants under to weed management entities for the control or eradication of noxious weeds.section 7786(a) of this titlesection 7783 of this title

children.heading: Agreements
children.label: c Agreements
children.text: Subject to the availability of appropriations under , the Secretary shall enter into agreements under with weed management entities to provide financial and technical assistance for the control or eradication of noxious weeds.section 7786(b) of this titlesection 7784 of this title
